name: Castell de Sant Nicolau
description: A 17th-century defensive tower at the mouth of Ciutadella harbour, beside a viewpoint with a monument to David Glasgow Farragut. It offers sunsets towards Mallorca and a coastal walk, a short visit that pairs well with the old town.

highlights: climb to the terrace of the 17th-century defence tower (marés sandstone)
the sunset over the harbour mouth and the city
the monument to Admiral David G. Farragut, of Ciutadella roots
